title: Peter and Stewie in the Cloud

dialogue.line: Hey Stewie, what's this cloud everyone's talking about?
Think of it like a giant, invisible library in the sky.
But technically, it's a network of remote servers storing data online.
These servers are managed by data centers worldwide.
It lets you access files on the internet, not just your computer.
So, like how I can stream 'Die Hard' anywhere?
Precisely, but also for photos, apps, even businesses.
So, no rain in this cloud then?
Only if you upload water balloons, Peter.
